scripts.dev: concurrently -n "DB,FRONTEND,BACKEND" -c "blue,green,yellow" "npm run dev:db" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.db:migrate: npm run db:up && npx wait-on tcp:localhost:5433 -t 30000 && npm run prisma:migrate
scripts.build: npm run build:libs && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build:libs: npm run build -w @atlas/types && npm run build -w @atlas/database
scripts.db:fix-collation: docker exec atlas-postgres psql -U postgres -d postgres -c "ALTER DATABASE template1 REFRESH COLLATION VERSION;" && docker exec atlas-postgres psql -U postgres -d postgres -c "ALTER DATABASE postgres REFRESH COLLATION VERSION;" && docker exec atlas-postgres psql -U postgres -d atlas -c "ALTER DATABASE atlas REFRESH COLLATION VERSION;"
